query: SELECT c.id, c.claim_number, c.incident_description, c.incident_type FROM claims c WHERE c.id = (SELECT claim_id FROM ai_assessments WHERE id = 2010001);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT c.id, c.claim_number, c.incident_description, c.incident_type FROM claims c WHERE c.id = (SELECT claim_id FROM ai_assessments WHERE id = 2010001);
